variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11780 K Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11780 K Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11780 K is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: FIL Filter HP 708 K | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11780 K
variants.description: Genuine FIL Filter HP 708 K. Easy to install and replace, the HP 708 K is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF1830KM Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 11780 K
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF1830KM axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
